item.title: Liberals were often recognise some form of an issue but gaslight you into believing the solution isn’t the obvious problem and t...
item.description:
Liberals were often recognise some form of an issue but gaslight you into believing the solution isn’t the obvious problem and the obvious answer but some esoteric right wing nonsense. #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I don’t know how a human looks at this and fails to see what is so depraved and racist about this
item.description:
I don’t know how a human looks at this and fails to see what is so depraved and racist about this. I understand that we need to work within the country and system we have and I endeavour to do so, but every time I see stuff like this I almost vomit#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Yeah, it is racist to celebrate a political entity that has represented the oppression of the entire world at least for the past...
item.description:
Yeah, it is racist to celebrate a political entity that has represented the oppression of the entire world at least for the past 70 years and a good portion of the world for the past 250



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are right, America is a racist country
item.description:
They are right, America is a racist country. And they are right we are trying to destroy it. GOOD. (That we are trying to destroy it)



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is not Independence Day
item.description:
This is not Independence Day. It is change of ownership day, because it is not independence for the indigenous people that is independence from the extreme harm that the American empire has caused and it is not independence for the working class.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
